propositions: The central docs index docs/README.md is incomplete, leaving four docs unlinked (attest-substrate.md, review-policy.md, session-id-shims.md, dco-rollout-evidence.md).
The index mixes living reference docs with historical evidence without any visual or structural distinction.
Three living/normative docs must each be linked exactly once under appropriate living-reference/policy buckets.
A labeled 'Historical evidence' section must group historical docs, moving existing listings without duplicating them.
A taxonomy note must define four buckets: living reference, policy, design rationale, historical evidence.
No files may be relocated (no git-mv) and no inbound links edited; only docs/README.md changes to avoid breaking cross-cutting references.
